title: Design System: Cứu Trợ Khẩn Cấp

display.purpose: Section headings and page titles. text-wrap: balance.

title.purpose: Card titles, call names. Dominant label size.

body.purpose: Descriptions, detail values. Max 75ch for prose.

label.purpose: Status tags, urgency badges, supplies chips, small meta.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Subtle card hover state. Indicates interactivity without competing with content.

shadows.name: card-active
shadows.purpose: Selected/expanded card. Accent-colored to visually tie the glow to the brand signal.

shadows.name: map-overlay
shadows.purpose: Map control buttons. Light lift against the tile layer.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (hover, focus, active, tab switch).

components.name: Tab — Active
components.description: Active status filter tab. Coral fill signals the current view filter.
components.css: .ds-tab { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-tab-active { background: #f86e64; color: #fff; } .ds-tab:not(.ds-tab-active) { background: #3A3A3A; color: #999; } .ds-tab:not(.ds-tab-active):hover { background: #444; color: #ccc; }

components.name: Tab — Inactive
components.description: Inactive status filter tab. Dark fill recedes; lightens on hover.
components.css: .ds-tab { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-tab { background: #3A3A3A; color: #999; } .ds-tab:hover { background: #444; color: #ccc; }

components.name: Call Card — Default
components.description: Distress call card in the left panel list. Dark surface with subtle border.
components.html:
Ngập lụt sâu 85

ACTIVE
📍 Thủ Đức, HCM⏱ 12 phút trước

Mưa lớn kéo dài gây ngập sâu 1.5m tại khu vực đường số 7, nhiều hộ dân bị cô lập, cần xuồng cứu hộ khẩn cấp...
components.css: .ds-card { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: #2E2E2E; border: 1px solid #3A3A3A; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #555; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-card-top { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #F0F0F0; margin: 0; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; gap: 16px; font-size: 13px; color: #888; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 13px; color: #777; line-height: 1.4; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }

components.name: Status Tag — Active
components.description: Status indicator pill. Coral for active, ember for in-progress, green for resolved.
components.css: .ds-status { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-status-active { background: rgba(248,110,100,0.15); color: #f86e64; } .ds-status-in-progress { background: rgba(230,81,0,0.15); color: #FF8A50; } .ds-status-resolved { background: rgba(46,125,50,0.15); color: #66BB6A; }

components.name: Urgency Badge
components.description: Urgency score badge shown alongside call titles. Color maps to severity.
components.css: .ds-urgency { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-urgency-high { background: rgba(248,110,100,0.15); color: #f86e64; } .ds-urgency-medium { background: rgba(230,81,0,0.15); color: #FF8A50; } .ds-urgency-low { background: rgba(141,110,0,0.15); color: #D4A84B; }

components.name: Supplies Tag
components.description: AI-suggested supply item chip. Purple palette distinguishes supplies from status elements.
components.css: .ds-supplies { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; background: #2A2540; color: #B39DDB; font-weight: 600; margin: 2px 3px 2px 0; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Circular toolbar icon button. Dark base, lightens on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" title="Nhắn tin"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: #3A3A3A; border: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; color: #888; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { background: #4A4A4A; color: #E0E0E0; } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f86e64; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Icon — Active
components.description: Sidebar navigation icon. Active state uses coral fill to indicate current tool.
components.html: <button class="ds-sidebar-icon ds-sidebar-icon-active" title="Bản đồ"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polygon points="1 6 1 22 8 18 16 22 23 18 23 2 16 6 8 2 1 6"/><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="18"/><line x1="16" y1="6" x2="16" y2="22"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-sidebar-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-sidebar-icon { background: transparent; color: #666; } .ds-sidebar-icon:hover { background: rgba(248,110,100,0.12); color: #f86e64; } .ds-sidebar-icon-active { background: #f86e64; color: #fff; } .ds-sidebar-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f86e64; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Every distress call is a signal that needs attention. The interface is pared down to focus, precision, and alertness — like a mission control room where each notification arrives with clarity and each action is deliberate. There is no decoration that doesn't serve the task. The system is dark by default: deep charcoal surfaces create a canvas where urgency signals — the coral accent, the colored status badges — command attention through contrast. Tonal layering replaces shadows as the primary depth mechanism; lighter surfaces sit forward, darker ones recede.
keyCharacteristics: Deep, tonal dark theme with layered charcoal surfaces
Coral accent for urgency signals only — never decorative
Fixed rem scale, single family (DM Sans), tight hierarchy
Pill-shaped components (tabs, badges, tags) as the dominant affordance
Circular icon buttons (32px) for toolbar actions
Vietnamese-first: all UI copy, data, and geography
No shadows at rest; tonal layering for depth; subtle shadows for interactive feedback

rules.name: The One-Fire Rule
rules.body: The coral accent covers ≤15% of any screen. When everything is urgent, nothing is.

rules.name: The Semantic-Only Rule
rules.body: Color is never the sole conveyor of meaning. Every status has a text label, an icon, and a badge shape alongside its color.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: All font sizes are in fixed px. No fluid clamp() sizing — product UI is viewed at consistent DPI.

rules.name: The Tight Scale Rule
rules.body: Ratio between steps is ~1.15. A tighter scale prevents visual noise in dashboard contexts.

rules.name: The Tonal-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Use background lightness, not shadows, to establish depth. Shadows are a response to state, not a layout tool.

dos: Use the coral accent sparingly — ≤15% of any screen. Its rarity signals genuine urgency.
Use tonal layering for depth. Keep surfaces flat at rest; shadows only on hover/active.
Pair every status color with a text label. Color alone is never sufficient to convey status.
Use DM Sans across the entire interface. No second font family.
Use fixed px sizes, not fluid clamp(). This is a product dashboard, not a marketing page.
Keep line length at 65–75ch for prose descriptions in cards.
Use circular (50% radius) icon buttons at exactly 32px for toolbar actions.
Use pill-shaped components (8px radius) for tabs, status tags, and badges.
Use the text-wrap: balance property on headings for even line lengths.
Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast: body ≥4.5:1, large text ≥3:1.
donts: Use gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid colors only.
Use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient accent).
Use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow text above every section.
Use numbered section markers (01/02/03) as default scaffolding.
Use the accent color for inactive states, decorative fills, or chrome.
Use identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly).
Let text overflow its container. Test headings at all breakpoints.
Use the cream/sand/beige warm-neutral background default. This is a dark-toned operational interface.
Invent custom affordances for standard tasks (scrollbars, form controls, modals).
